matches.text: The israelis have been strategically dropping dozens of HIGHLY-lethal cluster munitions disguised as children’s toys & footballs into Lebanon https://t.co/tnjCO4HqDG
matches.why: The post claims Israelis dropped explosives disguised as children's toys and footballs; candidate 0 debunks viral footage allegedly showing explosives disguised, matching the claim.

factcheck.claim: Social media users are claiming the Israeli military has booby-trapped food cans in Gaza, where, by the United Nations’
factcheck.note: The viral footage does not show explosives disguised as food. Experts say the metal cylinders are containers for M603 fuzes used to detonate landmines; one is labeled "fuze mine." They aren't designed to explode when opened, requiring 140-750 pounds of force to ignite. Source: https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2024/feb/01/instagram-posts/no-viral-footage-doesnt-show-explosives-disguised/
